executives.name: Rami Rahim
executives.background: Mr. Rahim has served as our Chief Executive Officer since November 2014. He has been with Juniper since 1997, serving in various roles including Executive Vice President and General Manager of the Development and Innovation organization.

executives.name: Ken Miller
executives.background: Mr. Miller has served as our Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since February 2016. He joined Juniper in 1999 and has held various senior financial roles.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Chris Eldredge
executives.background: Mr. Eldredge has served as our Executive Vice President, Chief Customer Officer since January 2024. He previously served as Senior Vice President, Customer Operations.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Chief Customer Officer

executives.name: Eva Andres
executives.background: Ms. Andres has served as our Chief Human Resources Officer since 2019. She previously held HR leadership roles at Virtustream and Dell EMC.

board_of_directors.name: Scott Kriens
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Kriens has served as Chairman of the Board since 1996. He served as our CEO from 1996 to 2008.

board_of_directors.name: Rami Rahim
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Rahim is the CEO of Juniper Networks and has been a director since 2014.

board_of_directors.name: Anne DelSanto
board_of_directors.background: Ms. DelSanto is a former Executive Vice President at Salesforce.com, Inc. She joined the board in 2021.

board_of_directors.name: Kevin DeNuccio
board_of_directors.background: Mr. DeNuccio is the founder of Wild West Capital LLC and former CEO of Violin Memory.

board_of_directors.name: James Dolce
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Dolce is the CEO of Lookout, Inc. and has extensive experience in the networking industry.

board_of_directors.name: Christine Gorjanc
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Gorjanc was the CFO of Arlo Technologies and Netgear.

board_of_directors.name: Janet Haugen
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Haugen was the CFO of Unisys Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: William Stensrud
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Stensrud is a partner at Switchback Concepts and has been a director since 1996.
